_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for FROZEN, observed data-state numbers of Pipeline A (counts and sizes derived from the source-data snapshot). Tunable design knobs live in parameters.json, not here.
_meta.snapshot_note: Values reflect the v1 raw_ohlcv_1h build / LEAN zip set. Update ONLY this file when the underlying DuckDB/zip snapshot changes, then run: python3 config/data_state_gate.py build && python3 config/data_state_gate.py check

provenance.universe_size: derived from _universe_derivation (quality-filtered subset of the 510 ZIP inventory)
provenance.lean_zip_count: count of <ticker>.zip in the LEAN store before the universe quality filter
provenance.lean_zip_size_mb: du -m of the LEAN zip store

_meta.consumers: Generated into ENG/Layers_Short_SOT/** and README_A_Layer.md via na: marker regions, and into viz/main_data_flow.html from config/main_data_flow.html.tmpl. Do NOT hand-edit these numbers in those files; edit this registry and run config/data_state_gate.py build.

_universe_derivation.relationship: 503 universe tickers are the quality-filtered subset of the 510 ZIP files in the LEAN inventory.
_universe_derivation.quality_filter_rule: Keep tickers with sufficient 1h price history and acceptable gap coverage for the Pipeline A snapshot.
_universe_derivation.coverage_threshold_note: v1: exact numeric threshold intentionally left undefined (qualitative rule in quality_filter_rule)
_universe_derivation.excluded_ticker_list: not stored in A_Layers v1; add a filter artifact before treating this as a recomputable value
